title: Ship Management Associate/ Senior Associate
description:
We are seeking a dedicated individual to support our Ship Management Department in a role that combines accounting, finance support, and administrative coordination. This position offers the opportunity to work closely with in-house and third-party ship managers, contributing to the smooth financial reporting and operational oversight of our marine activities.

Responsibilities

  • Assist in the preparation of full spectrum of vessel accounting
  • Undertake marine accounting work, creating AP, AR and GL and provide support in preparing vessel expenses report which includes generating monthly and quarterly settlement reports from the system
  • Review the monthly expenses invoice to ensure the cost incurred are properly charged according to the budget allocation
  • Monitor and review the procurement supply from vessel managers
  • Coordinate with vessel managers in preparation for contracts
  • Assist with the preparation of the marine insurance renewal and termination
  • Process insurance invoice and maintain the records
  • Assist all necessary documents for audit purpose
  • Take minutes for ongoing project meetings
  • Other administrative ad-hoc duties as assigned

Requirements

  • Minimum Diploma, preferably in Accounting, Maritime Studies, Business Administration, Data Management or a related discipline
  • Minimum 2 years of working experience in shipping or ship management companies handling vessel expenses or accounting matters
  • Strong proficiency in all Microsoft Office applications
  • Willingness to work overtime when necessary (i.e. during monthly closing)
  • Independent and meticulous
  • Good team player with positive working attitude

postedCompany.description:
MOL Chemical Tankers was established in 1972 and joined the Mitsui O.S.K. Lines, Ltd. Group in April 1996. As a professional marine ship operator specialising in parcel tanker services for the transportation of bulk liquid chemicals, vegetable oils and animal fats, we have been expanding our business, and have achieved the world’s 3rd largest fleet in terms of transport capacity via stainless steel tanks in the chemical tanker industry.

Under our corporate philosophy “Where there is safety, there is prosperity”, we have been making continuous and restless efforts to provide safe and reliable services. Operating chemical tankers requires ourselves not only to comply with various international regulations, but also to be more conscious of environmental protection as well as strict quality/ safe management. It also requires us to comply with various requirements and standards which our customers individually set up. We are very proud of being a leading company in the chemical tanker industry, with the capability of high-level operating skills as well as ship management skills to meet various customers’ needs.

In 2012, we transferred our head office from Japan to Singapore, which is a premier global hub port offering seamless global trade connectivity. Since then, we have been expanding our business sales locations to Singapore, Tokyo, London, Houston and Dubai, where we closely carry out our businesses with our valued customers.

On January 1st, 2017, we changed our company name from Tokyo Marine Asia Pte Ltd to MOL Chemical Tankers Pte. Ltd. We aim to provide our customers with better services, adding greater values, by utilising MOL group’s comprehensive strength.

Beginning from 2017 to 2019, our company will have 13 new large-scale stainless steel chemical tankers added to our fleet. I believe that with these new large vessels of great capabilities, it would allow us to enhance our competitiveness and expand our businesses into new horizons.

As we grow our fleet of sophisticated stainless steel carriers, we also anticipate business opportunities in the segment of MR size coated chemical carriers, terminal storage and ISO-container transportation. By realising and capitalising on these opportunities, we aim to be a leading service provider with innovative logistical solutions!
postedCompany.name: MOL Chemical Tankers PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
